sentence: 这位学妹刚入学，需要多关照。
pinyin: Zhè wèi xuémèi gāng rùxué, xūyào duō guānzhào.
english: This junior female schoolmate just enrolled and needs more guidance.

meaning: 1. fish head; 2. fig. upright and unwilling to compromise
sentence: 妈妈最喜欢吃剁椒鱼头。
pinyin: Māma zuì xǐhuān chī duòjiāo yútóu.
english: Mom loves eating steamed fish head with chopped chilies.

sentence: 遥感技术可以监测森林火灾。
pinyin: Yáogǎn jìshù kěyǐ jiāncè sēnlín huǒzāi.
english: Remote sensing technology can monitor forest fires.

sentence: 这条新闻的可信度值得怀疑。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo xīnwén de kěxìndù zhídé huáiyí.
english: The credibility of this news report is questionable.

sentence: 图书馆里收藏了大量珍贵古籍。
pinyin: Túshūguǎn lǐ shōucáng le dàliàng zhēnguì gǔjí.
english: The library houses a large collection of precious ancient texts.
